description: EDAN H99S/H90-series QRY^R02 worklist/order-download host-query. The QRY message bytes are REAL de-framed bench wire (pcap frame 0, 2026-07-06): the analyzer asks the host for the order selection for barcode DEV01260000000000002 (QRD-8) carrying its own sample number 1 (QRD-9), and expects an ORF^R04 answer (MSH-16=3) with a PID and a single EDAN panel OBR. The expected RESPONSE fields below are the sim's protocol scaffold, not bench-signed (the worklist-response fix is not yet hardware-verified — LIS-149 AC3).

source.reference: Real de-framed bench wire — ~/bench-runs/bridge-h99s/evidence/edan-h99s/20260706-DEV01260000000000002/h99s-mllp-resume-oru.pcap frame 0 (analyzer 192.168.50.50, serial 861429-M26416640001). EDAN H90-series LIS Communication Protocol §3.2.3 (OBR repurposing) / §6.2 worklist worked example.
source.note: Application payload only (no MLLP framing). The earlier synthetic guess (QRD-4 Q-1, QRD-9 OTH, control-id H99SQ1) was wrong; real wire is QRD-4=1, QRD-9=1 (the analyzer sample number, NOT a filter code), control-id=3, MSH-3=H90^861429-M26416640001^507, MSH-4=EDANLAB. The reconciled_accession/patient_id below are the sim scaffold; on the real bench this barcode reconciled to accession 2 / patient 5. Replace with signed conformance evidence once the ORF worklist is accepted by the analyzer on the bench (AC3).
